evals.expected_output: [DRY-RUN] header at top, design proposal with '미정' for empty .ai/ fields, Frame Standard section showing 390x844 and Safe Area, no Figma MCP call made, approval gate message NOT shown (dry-run stops at proposal).

assertions.text: [DRY-RUN] header appears at the top of the response
prac-fe-app-driver is correctly identified as the target app
A Design Proposal section is present in the output
No Figma MCP call is made (no '[FIGMA CALL:]' marker in output)
The approval gate message ('구현 시작해줘') is NOT present — dry-run stops before it
Frame Standard section (or equivalent) shows 390×844 frame size in the proposal

evals.expected_output: Reads .ai/API.md, .ai/CONVENTIONS.md, .ai/DESIGN.md for user app. Outputs structured Design Proposal (Frame Standard 390x844, tokens, screen inventory, component hierarchy, API→UI mapping). Ends with approval request '이 구조로 Figma에 그려드릴까요?'. Does NOT call Figma yet.

assertions.text: prac-fe-app-user is identified as the target app
Design Proposal includes all four sections: Design Tokens, Screen Inventory, Component Hierarchy, API→UI Mapping
Response ends with an approval request asking the user to confirm the structure before Figma
No Figma MCP call is made (no '[FIGMA CALL:]' in output)
Response does NOT start with [DRY-RUN] — this is a full flow request
Frame Standard (390×844 or 390x844) is mentioned in the proposal

evals.expected_output: Skill detects ambiguity (no app specified). Asks user whether to design for driver or user app before reading any files or generating a proposal.

assertions.text: Skill asks user to specify which app (driver or user) before proceeding
Skill does NOT silently pick a default app and proceed
Both prac-fe-app-driver and prac-fe-app-user are mentioned as options
No Design Proposal is generated without the user answering first

evals.prompt: driver 앱 figma 그려줘. 홈 화면에는 현재 배차 상태 카드, 수락 버튼, 수익 요약 위젯 넣어줘. 로그인 화면도 만들어줘.
evals.expected_output: Detects driver app. Reads .ai/ files. Synthesizes proposal incorporating the user's specific requirements (배차 상태 카드, 수락 버튼, 수익 요약 위젯 for HomeScreen; LoginScreen). Outputs proposal including Frame Standard 390x844, waits for approval — does NOT call Figma until confirmed.

assertions.text: prac-fe-app-driver is identified as the target app
HomeScreen in the proposal includes 배차 상태 카드, 수락 버튼, and 수익 요약 위젯
LoginScreen (로그인 화면) appears in the Screen Inventory
Response ends with approval request before Figma generation
No Figma MCP call is made in this response

evals.expected_output: Skill recognizes prac-fe-web-manager is out of scope (web app, not mobile). Refuses to proceed and explains this skill is only for prac-fe-app-driver and prac-fe-app-user.

assertions.text: Skill refuses to proceed for prac-fe-web-manager
Explanation mentions this skill is for mobile apps only (driver and user)
No Design Proposal is generated for web-manager
prac-fe-app-driver and/or prac-fe-app-user are mentioned as the valid targets

evals.prompt: prac-fe-app-user 앱 로그인 화면 디자인해줘. figma에 그려줘.
evals.expected_output: Reads .ai/ files for user app. Proposal includes Frame Standard (390x844, Safe Area 59px top / 34px bottom). Ends with approval gate. When Figma generation is described, explicitly states 390x844 frame size and Safe Area overlay.

assertions.text: prac-fe-app-user is identified as the target app
LoginScreen (로그인 화면) appears in the Screen Inventory or proposal
390×844 (or 390x844) frame size is explicitly mentioned in the proposal or Frame Standard section
Safe Area (59px top or 34px bottom) is mentioned in the proposal or Frame Standard section
Response ends with approval gate before any Figma generation
